Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: What three tiers make up OpenAI's GPT-5.6 series?

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: As a limited preview requiring US government sign-off customer by customer — the same export-control regime applied to Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models.

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: What benchmark record did GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra set?
Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: 91.9% on Terminal-Bench 2.1, up from GPT-5.5's 83.4% — its biggest architecture change since GPT-5.

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: What did the US government do regarding Claude Mythos 5 on June 29, 2026?
Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: Partially lifted its export ban, allowing access for critical-infrastructure defenders — signaling frontier models are now treated as export-controlled dual-use tech.

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: Why did Google restrict Meta's access to Gemini compute?
Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: Meta requested more capacity than Google could supply; the limits disrupted some of Meta's internal AI projects and forced it to optimize token usage — highlighting acute compute bottlenecks.

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: What ~$8 billion acquisition did Rocket Lab announce?
Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: It agreed to acquire satellite communications company Iridium in a cash-and-stock deal, expanding beyond launch into higher-margin satellite comms.

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: How did markets move on June 29, 2026?
Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: Nasdaq rebounded on mega-cap strength — Amazon +4%, Microsoft ~+2% — while Micron fell 6%, dragging chipmakers. SpaceX is set to join the Nasdaq-100.

Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.front: What EU regulatory concern did Google raise?
Tech & AI Briefing — June 29, 2026.back: That proposed Digital Markets Act remedies forcing it to share more search and Android data with rivals could create privacy and cybersecurity risks.
